notes:
BeamNG Mod Manager Pro Alpha 1

Highlights:
- Public alpha release package for GitHub.
- Stable update feed support with SHA-256 package verification.
- Downloads and Repository Browser split into cleaner pages.
- In-app BeamNG Resources browser with safe download/staging flow.
- App-wide toast notifications and updated loading visuals.
- Smart BeamNG mod category detection and Mod Library category filters.
- Navigation Hub, scrollbar, update prompt, and UI polish passes.

Alpha note: this is an early public test build. Please report bugs with screenshots and steps to reproduce.
